findings.trend_analysis: HN discussions show strong demand for: (1) AI agent governance/security with 15+13 reactions on a permission hacking story, (2) Compliance automation — Estonia e-Residency generated 62 comments revealing real pain, (3) Self-hosted/BaaS alternatives with data sovereignty angle scoring 68+30. Key insight: enterprises want compliance wrappers around AI coding tools as secondary policy layer.
findings.competitive_landscape: Few dedicated tools for AI agent permission governance exist. Most are custom enterprise builds. Open-source opportunity is strong. Compliance automation for e-Residency has existing project in portfolio but no dedicated product.
